title: Keeleco Cow (18cm)
description: Product Description COW: Keeleco offers a range of incredibly soft eco-friendly plush toys, kids will love cuddling and snuggling up to them. They will love to imagine incredible adventures and make these cuddly toys real toys. Convenient size and easy to carry. Safety Warning Remove all labels before giving the plush toy to a child. The consumer must keep this leaflet
